message: Hey team — getting build failures across the board. Artifactory is returning 503s. Anyone else seeing this?
Yes! All our Harness pipelines are failing at the artifact pull step. Looks like it started around 8:00 AM.
Confirmed. jfrog.company.internal is completely unreachable. curl is timing out. This is firm-wide, not just our team.
I'm raising this to JFrog infra team now. @Marcus Webb can you check the ServiceNow ticket? P1 severity — all CI is blocked.
Our release train was supposed to deploy at 8:30. That's not happening. Three squads are now blocked: Payments, Auth, and Data Platform.
Ticket is up: INC0043821. JFrog team says they're investigating storage issues on the primary node. No ETA yet.
I can see in Dynatrace — Artifactory disk usage hit 100% at 07:58 UTC. Storage volume exhausted. This is a full outage.
Emergency workaround: can we pull from the DR mirror at jfrog-dr.company.internal? It was last synced at 07:45 UTC, so we'd be 15 min behind.
DR mirror is read-only and doesn't have the latest snapshot images. We'd be missing the hotfix we pushed at 07:50. Not safe for Payments.
JFrog infra team is on a bridge call. Root cause confirmed: automated log rotation job failed, cache filled the 2TB volume. Expanding storage now — ETA 45 minutes. @team stand by.
Director of Engineering just pinged me. She needs an exec update ASAP. Timmy — can you get her a COMM? Business stakeholders are starting to ask questions.
